name: Meok Dvsa Olicence Mcp
description: UK DVSA Operator Licence audit + Traffic Commissioner Public Inquiry brief generator. Comprehensive O-licence compliance (financial standing, repute, professional competence, PMI cadence, TM continuous effective control, subcontractor due diligence). PI brief generator alone avoids £8-25k legal + £20-100k/yr insurance jump + licence revocation risk. By MEOK AI Labs.
